description: Breast Cancer Wisconsin Diagnostic Dataset from UCI Machine Learning Repository
skip_reason: Wisconsin Breast Cancer dataset: the only categorical column is y (B/M diagnosis), but all other columns are continuous tumor measurements (radius, texture, perimeter, area, etc.). There is no treatment/exposure variable and no natural stratum variable — this is a binary classification dataset with continuous predictors, not an observational study with treatment groups and confounders suitable for Simpson's Paradox analysis.
